meaning: 霍巴特[澳大利亚塔斯马尼亚岛东南岸港市](塔斯马尼亚州首府)
examples: Hobart Town, by degrees, grew to be a fine city, with handsome buildings and well kept streets.
There, at the very foot of the lofty Mount Wellington, Hobart Town began to grow in its new situation.
The historic gate to colonial Hobart leads to the museum courtyard, which covers two recently discovered vaults.
He also has been awarded honorary doctorate degrees from URI and Hobart and William Smith Colleges.
The 25-year-old Yorkshireman suffered a torn calf muscle during the second game in Hobart on Friday.
